headline: Viatris Announces Positive Top-Line Results from Phase 3 Study of VR-205 in Japanese Adults with Primary Immunoglobulin A Nephropathy
summary: Viatris Inc. (Nasdaq: VTRS), a global healthcare company, today announced positive top-line results from a Phase 3 clinical trial evaluating the efficacy and safety of VR-205 (targeted-release budesonide formulation) (Nefecon®) in Japanese adult patients with primary immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN) at risk of developing end-stage renal disease.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Health Care Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks in turbulent markets. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings for high-yielding stocks, including accuracy rates.

headline: Viatris’ VR‑205 Phase 3 Trial in Japan Met Primary and Key Secondary Endpoints; Safety Profile Aligned With Global Studies, NDA Filing Planned by End‑2026
summary: VR-205 Met Primary Endpoint and Key Secondary Endpoints and Was Well ToleratedVR-205 Efficacy and Safety Profile in Japanese Patients Was Consistent with the Profile Observed in Global Studies Japanese New Drug
